privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetically generated Webots world created via setup_task.sh. It has been verified that the expected output path is exactly '/home/ga/Desktop/agri_smart_camera.wbt', the target CROP_CAMERA requires a maxRange of 5.0 and frameColor of [1.0, 0.5, 0.0], and all three WEED_N solids require recognitionColors set to [0.8, 0.2, 0.2], perfectly matching the explicit instructions and verifier logic.
